BP_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.label: Dweba Umugqa Wezinkumbulo
BP_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.description: Uma kuvuliwe, umugqa udwetshwa usuka maphakathi kwesikrini uye endaweni yegundane yamanje.
BP_DRAW_MOUSE.label: Khombisa Isikhundla Somcibisholo
BP_DRAW_MOUSE.description: Kubonisa isikhombisi sombuso endaweni yamanje yemouse ku-canvas ye-Dasher.
BP_CURVE_MOUSE_LINE.label: Umgudu Womugqa Wemouse Oligobile
BP_CURVE_MOUSE_LINE.description: Uma 'Dweba Umugqa weGundane' usebenzile, lokhu kwenza umugqa ulandele indlela egobile ethatha indawo engahlukanisiwe kaDasher njengengxenye.
BP_START_MOUSE.label: Qala/Misa usebenzisa igundane
BP_START_MOUSE.description: Kuvumela ukuqala nokuqeda ukuhamba kukaDasher ngokuhambisa igundane.
BP_START_SPACE.label: Qala/Misa nge-Spacebar
BP_START_SPACE.description: Kuvumela ukusebenzisa isikhala ukuqala nokumisa ukuhamba kweDasher.
BP_PALETTE_CHANGE.label: Ukushintsha Okuzenzakalelayo Kwepalethi
BP_PALETTE_CHANGE.description: Shintsha kusukela kuphepheni lombala ekumisweni ngokuzenzakalela uye kulowo ohlinzekwe ku-alibhabeti.
BP_TURBO_MODE.label: Imodi ye-Turbo
BP_TURBO_MODE.description: Yandisa isivinini uma ubamba ukhiye1 noma inkinobho yesokudla yegundane.
BP_SMOOTH_PRESS_MODE.label: Imodi Yokucindezela Ngokuthambisa
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE.label: Khombisa Indawo Ye-Mouse Ethambile
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE.description: Uma kuvuliwe, inkomba yegundane izokhombisa isikhundla esibushelelezi, hhayi okokufaka okungaqediwe.
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.label: Dweba Umugqa Wemouse Othambile
BP_SMOOTH_DRAW_MOUSE_LINE.description: Uma kuvuliwe, umugqa womcibisholo odweba uyophinde uthambise, ubonisa indlela yokufaka ehlungiwe.
BP_SMOOTH_ONLY_FORWARD.label: Gcwele Phambili Kuphela
BP_SMOOTH_ONLY_FORWARD.description: Uma kuvuliwe, ukuthambekisa kokufaka kusetshenziswa kuphela lapho uhamba phambili (ukhuphuka), hhayi lapho ubuya emuva.
BP_EXACT_DYNAMICS.label: Izinguquko Ezinembile
BP_EXACT_DYNAMICS.description: Kuvumela imodeli yezwelezwe elinembile kakhulu, kodwa engase ingabi bushelelezi, yokunyakaza.
BP_AUTOCALIBRATE.label: Zilungise ngokuzenzakalelayo Inhloso
BP_AUTOCALIBRATE.description: Izilungisa ngokuzenzakalelayo iphuzu elithi 'okuqondile phambili' ngokusekelwe esikhundleni esijwayelekile somkhomba womsebenzisi.
BP_REMAP_XTREME.label: Phinda Uhlele I-Angles Ezinkulu
BP_REMAP_XTREME.description: Iguqula ukuma kwezinto ukuhlinzeka ngendawo eyengeziwe yokuhamba ngamazinga aphezulu/naphansi kakhulu.
BP_AUTO_SPEEDCONTROL.label: Ukulawula Isivinini Okuzenzakalelayo
BP_AUTO_SPEEDCONTROL.description: Izilungiselela ngokuzenzakalela isivinini esiphezulu sokubhala ngokusekelwe ekusebenzeni komsebenzisi.
BP_LM_ADAPTIVE.label: Imodeli Yolimi Eguqukayo
BP_LM_ADAPTIVE.description: Ingabe imodeli yolimi kufanele ifunde njengoba ungenisa umbhalo.
BP_NONLINEAR_Y.label: I-axis enguY engahambisani ngokuya ngobukhulu
BP_NONLINEAR_Y.description: Faka ukungezi obekwe ngokungaqondile ku-axis ye-Y (isb. cindezela phezulu naphansi).
BP_STOP_OUTSIDE.label: Yeka Lapho Inkomba Iphuma
BP_STOP_OUTSIDE.description: Misa ngokuzenzakalela ukuhamba kweDasher uma isikhombisi segundane sishiya indawo yekhanvasi.
BP_BACKOFF_BUTTON.label: Nikeza emuva ekukhululweni
BP_BACKOFF_BUTTON.description: Uma kuvunyelwe, ukukhulula inkinobho kuzokwenza i-Dasher ikhuphuke kancane ngaphandle, kwenze kube lula ukulungisa amaphutha.
BP_TWOBUTTON_REVERSE.label: Inkinobho Yesibili Iyaphenduka
BP_TWOBUTTON_REVERSE.description: Uma kuvuliwe, inkinobho yesibili kusethi enezinkinobho ezimbili izobangela isenzo sokubuyisela emuva/ukunciphisa.
BP_2B_INVERT_DOUBLE.label: Guqula Isenzo Sokucindezela Kabili
BP_2B_INVERT_DOUBLE.description: Iguqula umsebenzi wokucindezela okuphindwe kabili kwenkinobho yesibili.
BP_SLOW_START.label: Ukuqala Kancane
BP_SLOW_START.description: Uma kuvuliwe, i-Dasher izokhuphuka kancane kancane ibe nesivinini esifunekayo ukusuka ekumeni ngokuphelele.
BP_COPY_ALL_ON_STOP.label: Khopisha uma Uma
BP_COPY_ALL_ON_STOP.description: Kopisha wonke umbhalo uye kukhuluzi wokunamathisela njalo lapho sime khona.
BP_SPEAK_ALL_ON_STOP.label: Khuluma ekumeni
BP_SPEAK_ALL_ON_STOP.description: Khuluma wonke umbhalo njalo lapho sime khona.
BP_SPEAK_WORDS.label: Khuluma Amazwi
BP_GAME_HELP_DRAW_PATH.label: Dweba Umzila Wosizo
BP_GAME_HELP_DRAW_PATH.description: Lapho sinikeza usizo, khombisa indlela emfushane kakhulu eya esivumelwaneni esihlosiwe.
BP_TWO_PUSH_RELEASE_TIME.label: Vumela Isikhathi Sokukhulula Uhlelo
BP_TWO_PUSH_RELEASE_TIME.description: Kushintsha ukuziphatha kwesikhathi lapho inkinobho ikhululwa kumodi yokucindezela kabili.
BP_SIMULATE_TRANSPARENCY.label: Lingisa Ukubonakala Ngokucacile
BP_SIMULATE_TRANSPARENCY.description: Vumela ukuxubana kwemibala yangaphakathi futhi ngaleyo ndlela kudingeke ukusekela ukuxubana kwe-alpha kumshini wokudweba.
LP_ORIENTATION.label: Uhlangothi Lwesikrini
LP_MAX_BITRATE.label: Isivinini Esikhulu (amabithi/ngesekhondi)
LP_MAX_BITRATE.description: Isivinini esiphezulu sokubhala. Uma 'Ukulawulwa Kwejubane Okuzenzakalelayo' kuvuliwe, lesi yisivinini esinqunyiwe.
LP_FRAMERATE.label: Isilinganiso Sezithombe Sesiboniso
LP_FRAMERATE.description: Izinga leframu elihlosiwe lokusebenza kwezinhlelo ezenzakalelayo.
LP_LANGUAGE_MODEL_ID.label: Imodeli Yolimi
LP_DASHER_FONTSIZE.label: Usayizi weFonti kaDasher
LP_MESSAGE_FONTSIZE.label: Usayizi Wezincwadi Zomyalezo
LP_SHAPE_TYPE.label: Uhlobo Lwenodi
LP_START_MODE.label: Qala Imodi
LP_UNIFORM.label: Amathuba Afanayo
LP_UNIFORM.description: Isisindo sokwenzeka okufanayo (×1000). Amanani aphezulu enza izimpawu ezingavamile zibe zinkulu.
LP_MOUSEPOSDIST.label: Ibanga Lesimo Sega
LP_PY_PROB_SORT_THRES.label: Umkhawulo Wokuhlela kwe-Pinyin
LP_PY_PROB_SORT_THRES.description: Hlela izimpawu eziguquliwe ngokwehliswa kwamathuba kuze kufike kuleliphesenti.
LP_MESSAGE_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sokuboniswa Komyalezo
LP_MESSAGE_TIME.description: Isikhathi lapho imilayezo engengaveli ibe ku-modal iboniswa khona, ngemizuzwana emincane.
LP_LM_MAX_ORDER.label: Ukuhleleka okukhulu kwe-N-gram
LP_LM_EXCLUSION.label: Ukukhishwa Komodeli Yolimi
LP_LM_UPDATE_EXCLUSION.label: Ukubuyekezwa kwe-LM Okukhethiwe
LP_LM_ALPHA.label: LM Alpha
LP_LM_BETA.label: LM Beta
LP_LM_MIXTURE.label: Ingxube LM
LP_LINE_WIDTH.label: Ububanzi Bomugqa Wemouse
LP_LINE_WIDTH.description: Misela ubuqina bomugqa odwetshiwe ku-cursor yegundane.
LP_GEOMETRY.label: Umgomo Wesikrini
LP_GEOMETRY.description: Kushintsha ukuboniswa kwejiyomethri okusetshenziselwa ukubonisa umhlaba weDasher.
LP_LM_WORD_ALPHA.label: Igama Alpha
LP_USER_LOG_LEVEL_MASK.label: Izinga Lomsebenzisi Lokungena Ngezansi
LP_USER_LOG_LEVEL_MASK.description: Lawula izinga lokubhalwa komsebenzisi, 0 = akukho, 1 = okufushane, 2 = okwemininingwane, 3 = kokubili.
LP_ZOOMSTEPS.label: Izinyathelo ze-Zoom
LP_ZOOMSTEPS.description: Kuchaza ukuthi zidingeka izinyathelo ezingaki ezahlukahlukene ukuze usondele kusuka kumbombo ongaphandle uye phakathi.
LP_B.label: I-Pharamitha B
LP_S.label: I-S-Parameter
LP_S.description: Okunqunyelwe kwe-algorithm okuhlobene nesivinini noma ukuzwela kwimodi yebhathini.
LP_BUTTON_SCAN_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sokuhlola
LP_BUTTON_SCAN_TIME.description: Ezimweni ezihlola ngokuzenzakalelayo izinketho, lokhu kusetha isikhathi ngemizuzwana yokulinda esinyathelweni ngasinye.
LP_R.label: I-R-Parameter
LP_RIGHTZOOM.label: Isiphindaphinda Sokuzoom Siya Kwesokudla
LP_RIGHTZOOM.description: Umphindaphinda othinta ijubane lokusondeza uma usebenzisa imodi yekhompasi.
LP_NODE_BUDGET.label: Isabelomali Sezikhungo
LP_NODE_BUDGET.description: Inani elihlosiwe (okungenani) lezinto zenodi okufanele ligcinwe.
LP_OUTLINE_WIDTH.label: Ububanzi Bomhubhe
LP_OUTLINE_WIDTH.description: Inani eliphelele liyibubanzi bomugqa wokudweba amabhokisi (gcwalisa kuphela uma ≥0).
LP_TEXT_PADDING.label: Ukugcwalisa Umbhalo
LP_TEXT_PADDING.description: Ibanga le-pixel lokufaka ohlakeni lwezinhlamvu ebhokisini.
LP_MIN_NODE_SIZE.label: Usayizi Omncane We-Node
LP_MIN_NODE_SIZE.description: Usayizi omncane wendawo (ngokwezixhumi ze-dasher) ukuze udwebe.
LP_NONLINEAR_X.label: I-axis engu-X engahambisani ngokuya ngobukhulu
LP_NONLINEAR_X.description: Ukucindezelwa okungahambisani komugqa we-X (0 = akukho, okuphakeme = okukhulu kakhulu).
LP_AUTOSPEED_SENSITIVITY.label: Ubucayi Besivinini Esizenzekelayo
LP_SOCKET_PORT.label: Isikhonkwane seSokhethi
LP_SOCKET_PORT.description: I-UDP/TCP socket ezosetshenziselwa ukufaka i-socket yenethiwekhi.
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_X_MIN.label: Isokhethi X Min
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_X_MIN.description: Phansi kunani le-X elilindelekile elivela kokufakwa kwenethiwekhi.
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_X_MAX.label: Isokhethi X Max
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_X_MAX.description: Phezulu kwezinga lezinani ze-X okulindeleke ku-input yenethiwekhi.
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_Y_MIN.label: I-Sokhethi Y Min
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_Y_MIN.description: Ezansi kwezinga lezinani ze-Y okulindeleke ku-input yenethiwekhi.
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_Y_MAX.label: I-Sokhethi Y Max
LP_SOCKET_INPUT_Y_MAX.description: Phezulu kunenani elilindelekile lama-Y elivela ekufakweni kwenethiwekhi.
LP_CIRCLE_PERCENT.label: Usayizi Wokuqala Womjikelezo
LP_CIRCLE_PERCENT.description: Iphesenti lobubanzi obuvundlile obujwayelekile lokusebenzisa njenge-radius yomjikelezo wokuqala.
LP_TWO_BUTTON_OFFSET.label: Izinkinobho Eziphindwe Kabili
LP_TWO_BUTTON_OFFSET.description: Ukwehluka kwesikhundla noma isikhathi okuhlobene nokufaka inkinobho yesibili.
LP_HOLD_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sokubamba Inkinobho
LP_HOLD_TIME.description: Isikhathi esincane (ngamamiliwesekhondi) okumele inkinobho icindezelwe ukuze ibhekwa njenge 'bamba' esikhundleni se 'thinta'.
LP_MULTIPRESS_TIME.label: Iwindi Eliningi-Lokucindezela
LP_MULTIPRESS_TIME.description: Iwindi lesikhathi (ngemizuzwana yamamili) lapho izingcindezelo eziningi zibalwa njengezinhlelo ezisodwa.
LP_SLOW_START_TIME.label: Isikhathi sokuqala kancane
LP_SLOW_START_TIME.description: Isikhathi kumasekhondi angamashumi amathathu esithathayo ukuze kusheshiswe ngokugcwele uma 'Ukuqala Kancane' kuvuliwe.
LP_SMOOTH_TAU.label: Ubuningi Bokuthambisa
LP_SMOOTH_TAU.description: Isikhathi esinqunyiwe sokuthambisa kokufaka. Amanani aphezulu aholela ekuthambeni okukhulu kodwa okuphendula kancane kokufaka.
LP_TWO_PUSH_OUTER.label: Isifunda Sangaphandle Sokucindezela Okuphindwe Kabili
LP_TWO_PUSH_OUTER.description: Ichaza usayizi wendawo yangaphandle yehlelo lokulawula 'okuphindwe kabili'.
LP_TWO_PUSH_LONG.label: Isikhathi eside sokucindezela
LP_TWO_PUSH_SHORT.label: Isikhathi Esifushane Sokucindezela
LP_TWO_PUSH_SHORT.description: Ichaza isikhathi eside kakhulu (ngemizuzwana engu-ms) se-'push' emfushane.
LP_TWO_PUSH_TOLERANCE.label: Ukubekezelela Okubili Ukucindezela
LP_TWO_PUSH_TOLERANCE.description: Ukubekezelelana kwesikhundla sokuvula izilawuli kuhlelo lokuthi 'cindezela kabili'.
LP_DYNAMIC_BUTTON_LAG.label: Ukubambezeleka Kwenkinobho Eyehlukahlukeneyo
LP_DYNAMIC_BUTTON_LAG.description: Isikhathi sokulibaziseka ikakhulu kwimodi yesikhuthazo esiphindwe kabili.
LP_STATIC1B_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sokunyakaza Okuqinile
LP_STATIC1B_TIME.description: Isikhathi ngemizuzwana engu-millisecond somodi ezinzile sokuhlola kusuka phezulu kuye phansi.
LP_STATIC1B_ZOOM.label: Isinyathelo Sokukhulisa Esimile
LP_STATIC1B_ZOOM.description: Inani lokukhulisa elisetshenziswa ngesinyathelo ngasinye kwimodi engashintshi.
LP_DEMO_SPRING.label: Ukuvuleka Kwehlobo
LP_DEMO_SPRING.description: Ipharamitha yomzimba yezibalo ye-'springiness' yekhursa ezenzakalelayo kumodi yedemo.
LP_DEMO_NOISE_MEM.label: Inkumbulo Yomsindo Wedemo
LP_DEMO_NOISE_MEM.description: Iphephadonga le-physics elilawula 'inkumbulo' noma ukuvumelana kwezinhlangano ezingahleliwe kumodi yedemo.
LP_DEMO_NOISE_MAG.label: Ubukhulu Bomsindo Wedemo
LP_DEMO_NOISE_MAG.description: Ilawula ubukhulu noma amandla okuhamba ngokungahleliwe kwimodi yedemo.
LP_MAXZOOM.label: Ukucasuka Kwe-Zoom / I-Max Zoom
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_INC.label: Ukukhuphuka Kwenjini Ngokuzisholo
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_INC.description: Inani lapho ijubane lenyuka khona kuzo zonke izibuyekezo uma umsebenzisi ehamba kahle.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_FREQ.label: Ijubane Lokuvuselela Okuzenzakalelayo
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_FREQ.description: Uma 'Ukulawulwa Kwejubane Okuzenzakalelayo' kuvuliwe, lokhu yikho ukuthi isivinini siphenywa kaningi kangakanani.
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_DEC.label: Ukwehliswa Kwesivinini Ngokubuyisela Emuva
LP_DYNAMIC_SPEED_DEC.description: Inani lapho isivinini sincishiswa khona lapho umsebenzisi eguqula indlela.
LP_TAP_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sokucindezela Kwe-Stylus
LP_TAP_TIME.description: Isikhathi esiphezulu (ngemizuzwana engu-ms) sokucindezela isikhali sokuthinta ukuze kubhekwa njenge-'tap' ekukhetheni izinto.
LP_MARGIN_WIDTH.label: Ububanzi Bwemargini
LP_MARGIN_WIDTH.description: Ububanzi bomfanekiso ohlangothini lwe-RHS (ngokwe- Dasher co-ords).
LP_TARGET_OFFSET.label: Ukushintshwa Kokulinganisa Kwenjongo
LP_TARGET_OFFSET.description: Ukushintshwa kwe-vertical ngesandla ukulungisa iphuzu elithi 'okuqondile phambili'.
LP_X_LIMIT_SPEED.label: Umkhawulo Wokushesha Okuhambayo Okwesicaba
LP_X_LIMIT_SPEED.description: Isiphindaphindi esinquma isivinini esiphezulu sokuhamba ngendlela evundlile, esenza kube lula ukuhlala ekuqondi okuthile.
LP_GAME_HELP_DIST.label: Usizo Lomdlalo Ibanga
LP_GAME_HELP_DIST.description: Ibanga lesisho ukusuka emkhakheni ukunquma ukuthi umsebenzisi udinga usizo.
LP_GAME_HELP_TIME.label: Isikhathi Sosizo Somdlalo
LP_GAME_HELP_TIME.description: Isikhathi lapho umsebenzisi kudingeka usizo ngaphambi kokusizwa.
SP_ALPHABET_ID.label: Ulimi lwezinhlamvu
SP_ALPHABET_1.label: Umlando Wezinhlamvu 1
SP_ALPHABET_2.label: Umlando Wezinhlamvu 2
SP_ALPHABET_3.label: Umlando Wezinhlamvu 3
SP_ALPHABET_4.label: Umlando Wezinhlamvu 4
SP_COLOUR_ID.label: Iphethini Lombala
SP_DASHER_FONT.label: Ifonti i-Dasher
SP_GAME_TEXT_FILE.label: Ifayela Lombhalo Wemidlalo
SP_GAME_TEXT_FILE.description: Ifayela elichazwe ngumsebenzisi elinezinhlamvu zokuzilolonga ukubhala.
SP_INPUT_FILTER.label: Isihlungi Sokufaka
SP_INPUT_FILTER.description: Isihlungi sokufaka esisetshenziselwa ukuhlinzeka imodi yokulawula yamanje.
SP_INPUT_DEVICE.label: Idivayisi Yokufaka
SP_BUTTON_MAPPINGS.label: Imephu Yamabhathini
SP_JOYSTICK_XAXIS.label: I-axis ye-Joystick X
SP_JOYSTICK_YAXIS.label: I-axis ye-Joystick Y
SP_JOYSTICK_YAXIS.description: I-joystick axis esetshenziselwa ukungenisa kwe-axis Y.
